# llms.txt for charlesmartin.au
# Charles Martin — computer scientist, musician, and researcher at the ANU

## About

Charles Martin is a Senior Lecturer in Computer Science at the Australian National University (ANU) in Canberra, Australia. He specialises in music technology, creative AI, and human-computer interaction. He is a researcher, musician, and digital artist whose work blends traditional instruments with machine learning and interactive computing.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://charlesmartin.au/
- Biography: https://charlesmartin.au/bio/
- Publications: https://charlesmartin.au/publications/
- Research lab (SMCCLAB — Sound, Music, and Creative Computing Lab): https://charlesmartin.au/lab/
- Projects: https://charlesmartin.au/projects/
- Blog: https://charlesmartin.au/blog/

## Research interests

- Intelligent Musical Instruments
- Machine learning for creative computing
- Human-Computer Interaction (HCI)
- Mobile music making
- Computer music, improvisation, and performance

## Selected projects

- MicroJam: mobile app for sharing tiny touch-screen performances with AI accompaniment (2016–2022)
- PhaseRings: musical instrument app
- IMPS (Interactive Music Prediction System): deep learning system for predicting musical gestures
- Ensemble Metatone: iPad ensemble exploring gesture recognition and machine learning
- Andromeda is Coming: improvised music and media duo
